attacking_style: Opportunistic sprinter who exploits positional chaos in reduced bunch sprints, attacking from blind spots (left side) in final meters when favorites are watching each other.
team_tactics: Operates independently without leadout train support, relying on self-positioning through final kilometers to exploit disrupted sprint situations.
terrain_preference: Reduced sprint finishes after selective climbing stages where his climbing background allows survival while pure sprinters are dropped. Thrives in disrupted sprint chaos.
vulnerability: Likely exposed in organized bunch sprints with intact leadout trains; depends on race disruption and opponents' tactical errors rather than raw sprint power.
key_patterns: Wins from unexpected positions exploiting favorites' mutual surveillance and positioning errors.
Spanish climber profile with hidden sprint speed for reduced bunch finishes.
Attacks from left side blind spot in final meters when sprint organization breaks down.
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated ability to capitalize on tactical situations with winning sprint speed in 2017
